metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.8-beta.11
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Removes the internal menu strip and its theme seam. - Adds the packaged icon and a two-tone PsyReaSFX wordmark to the toolbar. - Adds a permanent Help icon beside Settings. - Moves Watch Folder to General settings without removing any function.
